diagnostics.2: You missed one! Try touching each item as you count to make sure you get them all.
diagnostics.3: It looks like you forgot to count one of the groups. Read the problem again to find all the items.
diagnostics.correct_explanation: The answer is 1400. When we count each item carefully — making sure not to skip any or count any twice — we get 1400.

hint.level_0: What are you being asked to count? Look at the problem — are there groups to count separately?
hint.level_1: Try organizing what you need to count. Can you group items or use skip counting to make it faster?
hint.level_2: Count each group separately: 900, 900, 1000. Then add those groups together to get the total.
hint.level_3: Here's the solution: Counting everything gives us 1400. Make sure each item is counted exactly once.
